name: @jlovec/zhushen
description: App for agentic coding - access coding agent anywhere
author: Kirill Dubovitskiy & weishu

scripts.test:fast: bun run tools:unpack && bun test --bail=1 --max-concurrency=8 src/api src/parsers src/utils src/modules src/agent/backends src/claude/utils src/codex/utils src/cursor/utils src/opencode/utils src/bin
scripts.test:runtime: bun run tools:unpack && bun test --bail=1 --max-concurrency=4 src/commands/claude.test.ts src/configuration.test.ts src/ui/logger.test.ts src/terminal/TerminalManager.test.ts src/codex/codexRemoteLauncher.test.ts && bun test --bail=1 --max-concurrency=1 src/runner/controlClient.test.ts && bun test --bail=1 --max-concurrency=1 src/agent/sessionFactory.test.ts && bun test --bail=1 --max-concurrency=1 src/runner/run.test.ts src/runner/rootBypassDowngrade.test.ts
scripts.test:ink: bun run tools:unpack && bun x vitest@4.0.16 run src/ui/ink/useSwitchControls.vitest.ts --pool=threads --maxWorkers=1 --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:changed: bun run tools:unpack && bun test --bail=1 --max-concurrency=4 src/agent/sessionFactory.test.ts src/codex/codexRemoteLauncher.test.ts src/commands/claude.test.ts src/configuration.test.ts src/runner/rootBypassDowngrade.test.ts src/runner/run.test.ts src/terminal/TerminalManager.test.ts src/ui/logger.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: bun run tools:unpack && bun --env-file .env.integration-test test src/runner/runner.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:all: bun run test:safe && bun run test:runtime && bun run test:integration
